# Third-party 3D assets

This project uses downloaded 3D assets for the garden scene and creature models.

## Kenney Food Kit

- Source: https://www.kenney.nl/assets/food-kit
- License: Creative Commons CC0
- Used for: tomato, carrot, beet/radish-style vegetable models.

## Kenney Nature Kit

- Source: https://kenney.nl/assets/nature-kit
- License: Creative Commons CC0
- Used for: grass, flowers, mushrooms, fences, trees, and other garden background assets.

## Get3DModels / Quaternius Spider

- Source: https://www.get3dmodels.com/animals/spider/
- Listed author/license on source page: Quaternius, Public domain
- Used for: spider enemy model.

## Get3DModels insect GLB models

- Beetle: https://www.get3dmodels.com/animals/low-poly-beetle/
- Bee: https://www.get3dmodels.com/animals/low-poly-bee/
- Ladybug: https://www.get3dmodels.com/animals/stylized-ladybug/
- Listed license on source pages: CC Attribution
- Used for: beetle/insect enemy model variants.

GLB insect files were converted to FBX with Blender 4.5.3 for Unity import compatibility.
